daily_gratitude_diary.intro_text_1: Gratitude does not mean ignoring difficult emotions.
daily_gratitude_diary.intro_text_2: It simply means gently noticing moments - big or small - that feel steady, comforting, or meaningful.
daily_gratitude_diary.intro_text_3: Some days it may be something very small.
daily_gratitude_diary.grateful_step_2: What is one small thing you appreciate right now?
daily_gratitude_diary.reflection_text: When you focus on this moment, what do you notice in yourself?
daily_gratitude_diary.placeholder_feelin: When I think about this, I feel...
daily_gratitude_diary.closing_text_1: Taking time to reflect is an act of care.
daily_gratitude_diary.closing_text_2: You can return to this space anytime.
daily_gratitude_diary.no_entries: No entries yet. Start your first one today.
